notes:
v0.2.1 — small but important.

A user-trap fix that prevents you from getting stuck on an old version.

• New: install-location detection. If Voquence is running from your Downloads folder, Desktop, or anywhere other than Applications, a yellow banner appears in the main window telling you to drag the app over. macOS keeps a quarantine flag on apps in Downloads that makes auto-updates silently fail. Now Voquence catches that and tells you exactly what to fix.
• The banner has a "Show in Finder" button that opens the folder where Voquence is right now, so you can drag it from there into Applications in two seconds.
• Also: small clarification on the OpenAI API key field — it's now labeled optional if you're using Local Whisper.
